name: Sui Identity
description: zkLogin-aware identity resolver. SuiNS name ↔ address resolution, zkLogin proof verification, and CallReceipt-derived address reputation.

tools.name: resolve_address
tools.description: Resolve a SuiNS name (e.g. alice.sui) to its owner address.

tools.name: resolve_name
tools.description: Resolve a Sui address to its primary SuiNS name, if any.

tools.name: verify_zklogin
tools.description: Verify a zkLogin proof envelope. Returns { valid, issuer, subHash }; the raw OIDC subject is never returned.

tools.name: address_reputation
tools.description: Reputation for a Sui address derived from its on-chain CallReceipt count (read from the indexer mirror).
